page.title: Scouting
page.subtitle: Your scout's active work, findings and mission briefs.

empty.title: Scouting central is not open yet
empty.description: This page unlocks once the scout job system is live for your team.

scoutCard.defaultBody: You have not hired a talent scout. A baseline scout (rating {overall}) still covers your targeted jobs and missions, just with a wider read on what he finds.
scoutCard.capacityLabel: {capacity, plural, one {1 job at a time} other {# jobs at a time}}
scoutCard.capacityHintLocked: A second job at once needs a chief scout rated about 80 overall. Building the Scouting Network alone doesn't grant it.

queue.title: Active jobs
queue.reportIn: Report in {days, plural, one {1 day} other {# days}}

form.title: Start a mission
form.subtitle: Send your scout to cover a scene for a shortlist of prospects.
form.targetingNote: Targets free agents you can sign right away.
form.costNote: Missions run {days} days and cost {cost, number} in travel money from your budget. No refund if cancelled.

shortlist.title: Mission shortlists
shortlist.empty: No mission has reported back yet.

error.capacity: Your scout is already at full capacity. See the active jobs list, your existing job is still queued and will report as scheduled.
error.insufficient_funds: Not enough balance to cover the travel cost.
error.auth: You need to be logged in.
